title: 7 Voters React to Trump’s State of the Union Speech
author: Campbell Robertson, Ruth Igielnik, Christina Morales and Chris Hippensteel
fullText: With his job approval ratings ticking down, President Trump said that his second term so far was “a turnaround for the ages.” Did he persuade voters?
summary: With his job approval ratings ticking down, President Trump said that his second term so far was “a turnaround for the ages.” Did he persuade voters?
